title: 4-KT
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''4-KT''' was originally a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]], and was one of the first [[Droid/Legends|droids]] that [[Riboga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] sent [[QS-2D]] to set up its [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations on [[Uffel]]. As Uffel had no use for a medical droid, 4-KT was reprogrammed for droid development, and ended up working with [[G-8Y5]]. It enjoyed its creative work, and would sometimes continue to work until it had drained its [[Power cell/Legends|power cells]].

4-KT resembled a silver [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] skeleton with bright yellow [[Photoreceptor/Legends|eyes]]. Its head was slightly oblong because it had an extra boxlike appendage attached to the rear. It had ten long fingers on each hand, which were capable of incredible precision. 4-KT typically held the extra fingers outstretched when not in use.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-03-XX -->''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' {{1stm}}
